text.title: North Star Metric Design Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example: from trigger through validated artefact.

example.step: Trigger: preconditions in Applies-If hold; Skip-If clean.
Gather typed inputs per Prerequisites; cite each.
Register artefact; notify named reviewer for sign-off.

artefact.code: { "nsm_id": "nsm-acme-2026q2", "owner": "cpo@acme.io", "last_touched": "2026-05-23T11:00:00Z", "candidates": [ { "name": "weekly_active_users", "formula": "count(distinct user_id where active_7d=true)", "type": "leading", "evidence": "BI table fct_activity" }, { "name": "monthly_revenue", "formula": "sum(stripe_charges where month=this_month)", "type": "lagging", "evidence": "Stripe export 2026-05" }, { "name": "weekly_engaged_minutes", "formula": "sum(minutes_per_user where active_7d=true)", "type": "leading", "evidence": "BI table fct_engagement" } ], "selected": "weekly_engaged_minutes", "rationale": "leading indicator + ties to value hypothesis 'users save time by doing X'", "formula": "sum(minutes_per_user where active_7d=true)", "cadence": "weekly", "review_cadence": "quarterly NSM review", "template_version": "1.1.0", "status": "ready_for_review" }

example.step: Trigger: one or more Skip-If conditions fire.
Decision tree routes to conclusion ref='skip-this-methodology'.
Document skip rationale with the matching rule reference; no artefact emitted.
